scripts.test:rust:coverage:lcov: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('coverage/rust', { recursive: true })" && cd src-tauri && cargo llvm-cov --lcov --output-path ../coverage/rust/lcov.info
scripts.test:rust:coverage:html: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('coverage/rust/html', { recursive: true })" && cd src-tauri && cargo llvm-cov --html --output-dir ../coverage/rust/html
scripts.test:rust:coverage: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('coverage/rust/html', { recursive: true })" && cd src-tauri && cargo llvm-cov --lcov --output-path ../coverage/rust/lcov.info && cargo llvm-cov --html --output-dir ../coverage/rust/html
scripts.test:python:coverage:xml: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('coverage/python', { recursive: true })" && cd backend-python && pytest --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml:../coverage/python/coverage.xml
scripts.test:python:coverage:html: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('coverage/python/html', { recursive: true })" && cd backend-python && pytest --cov=app --cov-report=html:../coverage/python/html
scripts.test:python:coverage: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('coverage/python/html', { recursive: true })" && cd backend-python && pytest --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml:../coverage/python/coverage.xml --cov-report=html:../coverage/python/html
scripts.test:all: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:rust && npm run test:python
scripts.test:coverage:sonar: npm run test:frontend:coverage && npm run test:rust:coverage:lcov && npm run test:python:coverage:xml
